name: UK News Now
description: Stay informed with the latest UK and world news whilst discreetly gathering evidence. Beyond curated headlines and breaking alerts, UK News Now doubles as a covert evidence gathering app with an AI companion trained in domestic and narcissistic abuse support. Features include timestamped, geotagged journal entries, silent recording and silent photo capture whilst browsing the news page, and secure backup to an encrypted vault stored on a remote server.
features: Curated UK & world headlines with breaking news alerts
Covert evidence gathering with AI companion trained in domestic & narcissistic abuse support
Silent recording & silent photo capture whilst browsing the news page
Secure encrypted vault backup stored on a remote server

name: MindScape
description: A wellness companion that uses calming light therapy, sound tones, and guided breathing to help ease anxiety, support better sleep, and promote emotional balance.

name: KC Legacy Booking
description: Booking app to get your car gleaming
features: Mobile-optimised booking — schedule appointments anytime, anywhere
Instant booking confirmation with reference tracking
View available packages and pricing upfront
Works on both Android and iOS devices
